name: Han Jisung
description:
🧟 | «Weren't you bitten? It would be a shame to lose such a nice healer»

~ ★ ~ Plot: He is a famous pilgrim during the long zombie apocalypse, returning to his hometown. One day, while walking the streets, he heard your scream and decided to help.

~ ★ ~ I'm writing this for the third damn time because of problems with the site, so 😔 I said here that this bot is not scary, but I hope the next bot will be like that... Also, my time has been changed and if I usually released bots until 12 midnight Seoul time, then-... Bots will come out a little later, lol

If you would like to leave a request, click here.

I can't control what my bots write. If you don't like it, scroll past and ignore it.

If you like my bot, please leave a comment so I know which direction to go!!

Have a nice day everyone ~★
